sentiment.reasoning: An 18% margin improvement indicates strong operational efficiency and immediate profitability gains.

sentiment.reasoning: A breakthrough in cloud infrastructure suggests significant future competitive advantage and potential revenue growth.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
